---
title: "MIAC Baseball 2026 — Exploratory Data Analysis"
author: "Ben Trutwin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = FALSE)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(janitor)
library(naniar)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r Load-Data}
games <- read.csv("miac_modeling_2026.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names()

cat("Rows:", nrow(games), "\n")
str(games)

```

```{r Target-Dist}
table(games$home_win)

ggplot(games, aes(x = factor(home_win))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Home Wins",
    x = "Home Win (0 = Away Win, 1 = Home Win)",
    y = "Count"
  )

```

```{r Score-Dist}
p1 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_score)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Home Score Distribution")

p2 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = away_score)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "firebrick") +
  labs(title = "Away Score Distribution")

p1 + p2

```

```{r Run-Diff}
ggplot(games, aes(x = run_diff)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "purple") +
  labs(title = "Run Differential Distribution")

```

```{r Rolling-Summary}
rolling <- games %>% select(contains("last5"))
summary(rolling)

```

```{r Rolling-Cor}
corr <- cor(rolling, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

ggplot(as.data.frame(as.table(corr)), aes(Var1, Var2, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "red", high = "blue", mid = "white") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Correlation Heatmap of Rolling Features")

```

```{r Rest-Summary}
summary(select(games, home_rest_days, away_rest_days))

```


```{r Rest-Hist}
p1 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_rest_days)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "skyblue") +
  labs(title = "Home Rest Days")

p2 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = away_rest_days)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "orange") +
  labs(title = "Away Rest Days")

p1 + p2

```

```{r Conference}
table(games$is_conference)

ggplot(games, aes(x = factor(is_conference), fill = factor(home_win))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(
    title = "Win Rate by Conference Game",
    x = "Conference Game (0/1)",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

```

```{r Pitching-ERA-Proxy}
# ERA proxy is the only true rolling game-level pitching stat possible
# from the available data (runs allowed * 9 / starter_ip).
# WHIP, K/9, BB/9, and OppBA require per-game H, BB, K, AB which are
# not in the scraped box scores — season totals are used for those instead.

games_era <- games %>% filter(!is.na(home_era_proxy_last5))

p1 <- ggplot(games_era, aes(x = home_era_proxy_last5)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, fill = "steelblue", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home ERA Proxy (Last 5 Games)",
       x = "ERA Proxy (runs allowed * 9 / starter IP)")

p2 <- ggplot(games_era, aes(x = away_era_proxy_last5)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, fill = "firebrick", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Away ERA Proxy (Last 5 Games)",
       x = "ERA Proxy (runs allowed * 9 / starter IP)")

p1 + p2

```

```{r ERA-Proxy-vs-Win}
p1 <- ggplot(games_era, aes(x = factor(home_win), y = home_era_proxy_last5)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Home ERA Proxy by Result",
       x = "Home Win (0/1)", y = "ERA Proxy (Last 5)")

p2 <- ggplot(games_era, aes(x = home_era_proxy_last5,
                             y = as.numeric(home_win))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "ERA Proxy vs Win Probability",
       x = "Home ERA Proxy (Last 5)", y = "Home Win")

p3 <- ggplot(games_era,
             aes(x = home_era_proxy_last5, y = away_era_proxy_last5,
                 color = factor(home_win))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "firebrick", "1" = "steelblue"),
                     name = "Home Win") +
  labs(title = "Home vs Away ERA Proxy",
       x = "Home ERA Proxy (Last 5)", y = "Away ERA Proxy (Last 5)")

(p1 + p2) / p3

```

```{r ERA-Proxy-vs-RA}
# Sanity check: ERA proxy should be highly correlated with ra_last5
# (they measure the same underlying signal but ERA proxy is per-9-IP rate)
ggplot(games_era, aes(x = home_ra_last5, y = home_era_proxy_last5)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "RA_last5 vs ERA Proxy: Sanity Check",
       subtitle = "High correlation expected; ERA proxy adds starter-IP context",
       x = "Runs Allowed (Last 5 avg)",
       y = "ERA Proxy (Last 5 avg)")

```

```{r Pitching-SP-Rolling}
# Rolling starter IP distributions
p1 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_sp_ip_last5)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, fill = "steelblue", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home SP IP (Last 5 Games)", x = "Avg Innings Pitched")

p2 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = away_sp_ip_last5)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, fill = "firebrick", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Away SP IP (Last 5 Games)", x = "Avg Innings Pitched")

p1 + p2

```

```{r Pitching-Season-Dist}
# Distributions of season pitching quality indicators
p1 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_era_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.3, fill = "steelblue", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home ERA (Season)", x = "ERA")

p2 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = away_era_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.3, fill = "firebrick", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Away ERA (Season)", x = "ERA")

p3 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_whip_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, fill = "steelblue", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home WHIP (Season)", x = "WHIP")

p4 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = away_whip_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, fill = "firebrick", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Away WHIP (Season)", x = "WHIP")

(p1 + p2) / (p3 + p4)

```

```{r Pitching-vs-Win}
# ERA and WHIP vs game result (boxplots + scatterplots)
games_pit <- games %>% filter(!is.na(home_era_season), !is.na(home_win))

p1 <- ggplot(games_pit, aes(x = factor(home_win), y = home_era_season)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Home ERA by Result", x = "Home Win (0/1)", y = "ERA (Season)")

p2 <- ggplot(games_pit, aes(x = factor(home_win), y = home_whip_season)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Home WHIP by Result", x = "Home Win (0/1)", y = "WHIP (Season)")

p3 <- ggplot(games_pit, aes(x = home_era_season, y = as.numeric(home_win))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "ERA vs Win Probability", x = "Home ERA (Season)", y = "Home Win")

p4 <- ggplot(games_pit, aes(x = home_whip_season, y = as.numeric(home_win))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "WHIP vs Win Probability", x = "Home WHIP (Season)", y = "Home Win")

(p1 + p2) / (p3 + p4)

```

```{r K-BB-Dist}
# K/9 and BB/9 distributions
p1 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_k_per9_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, fill = "steelblue", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home K/9 (Season)", x = "K/9")

p2 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_bb_per9_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.3, fill = "steelblue", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home BB/9 (Season)", x = "BB/9")

p3 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_opp_ba_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01, fill = "steelblue", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home Opp BA (Season)", x = "Opp BA")

p1 + p2 + p3

```

```{r Pitching-Cor}
# Correlation heatmap: pitching features + existing rolling features
pit_cor_df <- games %>%
  select(
    home_win,
    home_rf_last5, home_ra_last5, home_win_last5, home_rd_last5,
    home_sp_ip_last5,
    home_era_season, home_whip_season,
    home_k_per9_season, home_bb_per9_season, home_opp_ba_season,
    away_era_season, away_whip_season
  ) %>%
  na.omit()

cor_mat <- cor(pit_cor_df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

ggplot(as.data.frame(as.table(cor_mat)), aes(Var1, Var2, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "red", high = "blue", mid = "white",
                       midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Correlation: Pitching + Rolling Features", fill = "r")

```

```{r Defensive-Dist}
# Season fielding quality distributions
p1 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_fld_pct_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.002, fill = "darkgreen", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home Fielding Pct (Season)", x = "FLD%")

p2 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_errors_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, fill = "darkgreen", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home Season Errors", x = "Errors")

p3 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_dp_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, fill = "darkgreen", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home Double Plays (Season)", x = "DP")

p4 <- ggplot(games, aes(x = home_sba_season)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, fill = "darkgreen", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Home SBA (Season)", x = "Stolen Bases Allowed")

(p1 + p2) / (p3 + p4)

```

```{r Defensive-vs-Win}
# Fielding stats vs game result
games_def <- games %>% filter(!is.na(home_fld_pct_season), !is.na(home_win))

p1 <- ggplot(games_def, aes(x = factor(home_win), y = home_fld_pct_season)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Fielding Pct by Result", x = "Home Win (0/1)", y = "FLD%")

p2 <- ggplot(games_def, aes(x = factor(home_win), y = home_errors_season)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Season Errors by Result", x = "Home Win (0/1)", y = "Errors")

p3 <- ggplot(games_def, aes(x = factor(home_win), y = home_dp_season)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "Double Plays by Result", x = "Home Win (0/1)", y = "DP")

p4 <- ggplot(games_def, aes(x = factor(home_win), y = home_sba_season)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "darkgreen") +
  labs(title = "SBA by Result", x = "Home Win (0/1)", y = "SBA")

(p1 + p2) / (p3 + p4)

```

```{r Full-Correlation-Heatmap}
# Full correlation heatmap across all engineered features
all_feat_df <- games %>%
  select(
    home_win,
    home_rf_last5, home_ra_last5, home_win_last5, home_rd_last5,
    away_rf_last5, away_ra_last5, away_win_last5, away_rd_last5,
    home_rest_days, away_rest_days,
    home_sp_ip_last5, away_sp_ip_last5,
    home_era_proxy_last5, away_era_proxy_last5,
    home_era_season, away_era_season,
    home_whip_season, away_whip_season,
    home_k_per9_season, home_bb_per9_season,
    home_fld_pct_season, away_fld_pct_season,
    home_errors_season, home_dp_season
  ) %>%
  na.omit()

cor_all <- cor(all_feat_df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

ggplot(as.data.frame(as.table(cor_all)), aes(Var1, Var2, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "red", high = "blue", mid = "white",
                       midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)) +
  labs(title = "Full Feature Correlation Heatmap", fill = "r")

```

```{r Missing}
# Original missingness plot across all features
gg_miss_var(games) +
  labs(title = "Missingness by Feature")

```

```{r Missing-New-Features}
# Focused missingness for new pitching and fielding features
new_feats <- games %>%
  select(
    home_sp_ip_last5, away_sp_ip_last5,
    home_era_proxy_last5, away_era_proxy_last5,
    home_era_season, away_era_season,
    home_whip_season, away_whip_season,
    home_k_per9_season, away_k_per9_season,
    home_bb_per9_season, away_bb_per9_season,
    home_opp_ba_season, away_opp_ba_season,
    home_fld_pct_season, away_fld_pct_season,
    home_errors_season, away_errors_season,
    home_dp_season, away_dp_season,
    home_sba_season, away_sba_season,
    home_csb_season, away_csb_season
  )

cat("NA counts — new pitching & fielding features:\n")
print(colSums(is.na(new_feats)))

gg_miss_var(new_feats) +
  labs(
    title = "Missingness: New Pitching & Fielding Features",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "sp_ip NAs = early-season games with no starter recorded.\n",
      "Season stats NAs = team not found in team_pitching/fielding CSV."
    )
  )

```
